claim: The city council approved a 15% budget increase for public transport.

corpus.title: Council Minutes Jan
corpus.snippet: Council voted 7-2 to approve a 5% budget increase for transport.
corpus.content: The city council met on Jan 1 2023. After deliberation, the council voted 7-2 to approve a 5% budget increase for public transport services.

corpus.title: City News Roundup
corpus.snippet: Council approves transport budget changes in close vote.
corpus.content: The city council approved budget changes for public transport in a close vote this week.

corpus.title: Metro Daily Report
corpus.snippet: City council approved 15% budget increase for public transport.
corpus.content: Breaking: The city council approved a 15% budget increase for public transport, a major boost for commuters.

corpus.title: Weekly Digest
corpus.content: This week the council made several decisions including transport budget changes.
